titleStmt.title: SII 41.103: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 103. (A.R. No. 102 of 1905.) Ambāsamudram, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the south wall of the Erichchā-Uḍāiyar shrine in the Ericbchā-Uḍaiyāar temple at Ambāsamudram.

p.hi: Chōḻa-Pāṇḍya, Chaḍaiyavarman Sundara-chōḻapāṇḍya, Year 18 = c. 1050 A.D.

summary.p: Fragments. Only the names of the temples of Tiruppōttuḍaiyār and Tiruchchālaittuṟai Śrīmūlastānamuḍaiyār are to be seen.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīkoccaṭa Uṭai[yār śrīcu]n=tara
coḻapāṇṭiya tevarkku yāṇṭu 10 8 Āvatu Irājarājappāṇ
ṭi ñāṭṭu muṭikoṇṭa coḻavaḷa nāṭṭu muḷḷiñāṭṭu brahmadeya
m śrīrājarājac caruppetimaṅkalattut teṉpiṭākai
t tiruppottuṭaiyār koyililum tiruccālaittuṟai
śrīmūlasdhāṉamuṭaiyār koyililum Akanāḻikai muṉṉūṟṟu
van ceṅkatirmālai viṟ Ampalavan tiru

tirātittaval celvatāka Ivvūr Ēḻāñceri
ttirumiḻalaic caṅkaranārāyaṇaṉ vaitta tirununtāviḷa
kkoṉṟukku viṭṭa Āṭu 6 10 Ivvāṭu Aṟupatum kaiy
koṇṭu Ittirununtāviḷakkoṉṟum cantirātittaval
Erippatāṉom Akanāḻikai ceyvom . Ikkoyili
l kuṭamum kuccikaiyuṅkoṇṭu pukka Avakaḷe
tirununtāviḷakkoṉṟum Erippatāṉom

kācu Iraṇṭum Āka kācu pattu Ikkācu 10 ṅkoṇṭu Āṭṭaivaṭṭam
poliyūṭṭāṉa nel patiṉkalam Ikkaṇkāṇiyoṭumaṭṭiyaḷa
ntu can=tirātittavaṟ celittuvatāṉom tiruppottuṭaiyār ko
yililakanāḻikaiyom vaicca nakkaṉum nūṟṟeṇmaṉ kaṇavati
yum Irāmaṉ centuvāṉu muḷḷiṭṭa Akanāḻikaiyom Itu pal māheśva
rarakṣai . mElppaṭi coḻapāṇṭiyaṉ maṭattukku tiruppottuṭai
yār koyil caṅkaranārāyaṇappiccanakamuṭaiyāḷ Appi nampāṉa taṇ
kākkuṅ kucakkalattukkum vaicca nel Aṟukalamum mēlppaṭi
Digital edition of SII 41.103 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
